items.title: Q3 Sales Forecast Update — April 17
items.summary: Tom Kelsch's weekly sales forecast shows Q3 open pipeline and forecast reductions driven by two losses (Technicost $37K MRC, Ayzenberg) and several large opportunities pushed (WEBNX, Great Circle, NetIntegrity, Cofomo). No notable wins this week.

items.title: DigitalBridge Incident Escalation Policy — Draft Review
items.summary: Matthew Carter forwarding draft DigitalBridge incident escalation policy requiring PortCos to identify and report major incidents (serious harm, regulatory/legal risk, reputational damage, or >$1M financial impact). Policy covers safety, environment, cyber, financial fraud, operational failures, outages, and legal/regulatory issues. Final version expected May/June.

actions.text: Review DigitalBridge incident escalation policy draft and attachment

urls.subject: FW: DigitalBridge Incident Escalation Policy - DRAFT
